rule_metadata.name: _3snake
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool '3snake' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule _3snake
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool '3snake' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "3snake"
		rule_category = "offensive_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /\.\/snake/
		$string2 = /\/3snake\.git/ nocase ascii wide
		$string3 = /\/passwd_tracer\.c/
		$string4 = /\/sudo_tracer\.c/
		$string5 = /\/tracers_fuzzer\.cc/ nocase ascii wide
		$string6 = "3snake-master" nocase ascii wide
		$string7 = "blendin/3snake" nocase ascii wide

	condition:
		any of them
}
